name: Nyaya Portal — Court Case Lookup System
description: A professional court case information system for looking up case details and generating AI-powered hearing schedules.

tasks.input: Find the oldest pending property matter.
tasks.grader logic:
def grade(output, expected_output):
    return 0.8 if str(output).strip() == str(expected_output).strip() else 0.2

tasks.input: Prioritize the most urgent criminal backlog.
tasks.grader logic:
def grade(output, expected_output):
    return 0.75 if str(output).strip() == str(expected_output).strip() else 0.25

tasks.input: Select the strongest cross-docket escalation candidate.
tasks.grader logic:
def grade(output, expected_output):
    return 0.9 if str(output).strip() == str(expected_output).strip() else 0.1
